spell.name: Blue Punch
entries: You make a melee spell attack. You have advantage on the attack roll if the target is wearing armor made of metal. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 lightning damage, and it can't take reactions until the start of its next turn.

spell.name: Cursed Lapse
entries: Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 force damage. A Medium or smaller target is pulled 3 meters toward the point of impact.
At Higher Levels: The damage increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 1st.

spell.name: Noxious Burp
entries: You release a 2-meter radius cloud of gas. Each creature in the area must succeed on a Constitution saving throw (DC 13) or take 1d4 poison damage.

spell.name: Healing Globs
entries: A creature of your choice within range heals 1d8 HP. If the target is at 0 hit points, they stabilize and wake with 1 hit point.

spell.name: Grow Plants
entries: You target a 3-meter square. Any creature in the area must succeed on a Strength saving throw (DC 13) or be restrained by rapidly growing weeds. A creature can use its action to make a Strength check against your spell save DC to break free.
Utility: You can use this spell to bloom flowers, ripen fruit, or grow a 3-meter vine.
